description: SessionStart reinject on clear/compact + spec template project-type awareness
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(hooks): SessionStart hook now fires on `clear` and `compact` events in addition to `startup` — ensures context is always re-injected after session reset (Claude + iFlow)

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(iflow): command templates now write to `.iflow/commands/feature/` subdirectory (was missing `feature/` prefix)
- fix(update): `collectTemplateFiles()` now checks `fs.existsSync` for backend/frontend spec dirs — prevents ghost spec files on project types that don't have them
- fix(init): `createSpecTemplates()` respects project type — backend-only projects skip frontend spec, vice versa
- fix(templates): removed dead `guidesCrossPlatformThinkingGuideContent` export and dead links in guides/index.md.txt
notes: No migration required. Template-level changes only — run `feature update` to sync. The settings.json changes (clear/compact matchers) will be applied automatically if the file hasn't been user-modified.
